summary: Frontend testing of GA4 events and subscription funnel components (TrialBanner, UpgradeModal, ReadOnlyBanner). All tests PASSED for active trial user (demo@trustoffice.com with 7 days remaining).
passed_tests: TrialBanner displays correctly on Dashboard - PASS
TrialBanner displays '7 days left in your trial' - PASS
TrialBanner shows Upgrade Now button with data-testid='trial-upgrade-btn' - PASS
TrialBanner displays on Distributions page - PASS
TrialBanner displays on Minutes page - PASS
ReadOnlyBanner NOT shown for active trial user (Dashboard) - PASS
ReadOnlyBanner NOT shown for active trial user (Distributions) - PASS
ReadOnlyBanner NOT shown for active trial user (Minutes) - PASS
GA4 trial_banner_viewed event fires on Dashboard - PASS: [GA4] Event: trial_banner_viewed {event_category: subscription, days_remaining: 7, location: dashboard}
GA4 trial_banner_viewed event fires on Distributions - PASS: [GA4] Event: trial_banner_viewed {event_category: subscription, days_remaining: 7, location: distributions}
GA4 trial_banner_viewed event fires on Minutes - PASS: [GA4] Event: trial_banner_viewed {event_category: subscription, days_remaining: 7, location: minutes}
GA4 trial_banner_clicked event fires when clicking Upgrade Now - PASS: [GA4] Event: trial_banner_clicked {event_category: subscription, days_remaining: 7, location: dashboard}
Upgrade Now button navigates to /settings?tab=subscription - PASS
Add Distribution button opens dialog for active trial user (not blocked) - PASS
UpgradeModal NOT triggered for active trial user when adding distribution - PASS

GA4_Analytics.console_logging: Enabled in development mode with [GA4] prefix

critical_code_review_comments: TrialBanner correctly checks subscription.is_trial && subscription.is_active before rendering
Color scheme logic: isUrgent (<=3 days) = red, isWarning (4-7 days) = amber, else = blue
GA4 events fire correctly with days_remaining and location parameters
ReadOnlyBanner correctly checks isReadOnly && subscriptionExpired before rendering
UpgradeModalContext.showUpgradeModal correctly checks isReadOnly before showing modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: All GA4 subscription funnel events and components verified working for active trial user. TrialBanner shows on Dashboard, Distributions, Minutes pages with correct days remaining (7). ReadOnlyBanner correctly hidden for active trial. UpgradeModal correctly not triggered when active trial user clicks Add Distribution. To test UpgradeModal trigger and ReadOnlyBanner display, would need a user with expired trial or canceled subscription (is_read_only=true).
